dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard

users.description: View and manage all organization members

users.updateMemberRoleDescription: Change the role for {name} in the organization.
users.inviteMembersDescription: Add email addresses to invite new members to your organization
users.allMembersReceiveRole: All invited members will receive this role

teams.title: Team Management
teams.teamsCardDescription: Manage teams and assign users to teams
teams.addTeamDescription: Add a new team to your organization
teams.descriptionPlaceholder: What does this team work on?
teams.deleteTeamConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? Team-scoped projects and meetings will become org-wide. This action cannot be undone.
teams.createFirstTeam: Create your first team to start organizing resources.
teams.assignDescription: Assign a user to a team and set their role
teams.assignFailed: Failed to assign user to team
teams.removeFromTeamConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {userName} from {teamName}?
teams.removeFailed: Failed to remove user from team
teams.noMembersSearch: No members match your search criteria.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Manage all organizations in the system
organizations.organizationCount: {count} organization{count, plural, one {} other {s}} in the system
organizations.createFirst: Create your first organization to get started
organizations.createDescription: Create a new organization for users to join
organizations.enterDetails: Enter the details for the new organization
organizations.organizationNameDescription: The display name for your organization
organizations.slugDescription: A unique identifier for the organization (lowercase, numbers, and hyphens only)
organizations.logoUrlDescription: A URL to the organization's logo image
organizations.displayNameDescription: The display name for the organization
organizations.noMembersYet: No members in this organization yet
organizations.memberCountLabel: {count} member{count, plural, one {} other {s}} in this organization
organizations.inviteMemberDescription: Send an invitation email to add a new member to this organization. Optionally assign them to teams.
organizations.emailDescription: The email address of the person you want to invite
organizations.roleDescription: The role this member will have in the organization
organizations.assignToTeamsDescription: Select teams to add this member to after they accept the invitation
organizations.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available in this organization
organizations.invitationWithTeams: Invitation sent successfully with {count} team assignment{count, plural, one {} other {s}}
organizations.dangerZoneDescription: Permanently delete this organization and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
organizations.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the organization {name} and remove all associated data including {memberCount} member{memberCount, plural, one {} other {s}}.

agentConfig.title: Agent Configuration
agentConfig.description: Configure agent settings and manage agent access for organizations
agentConfig.manageAccess: Manage agent access for {count} organization{count, plural, one {} other {s}}
agentConfig.willAppear: Organizations will appear here once they are created
agentConfig.disableDescription: This will disable the AI agent for this organization. Users will see warning messages when trying to use chat functionality and other agent features. Organization admins and owners will be notified via email.
agentConfig.agentSettingsDescription: Configure global agent parameters like model, max tokens, temperature, and more
agentConfig.anthropicWarning: Anthropic models do not support frequency penalty or presence penalty settings. These parameters will be ignored.
agentConfig.maxTokensDescription: Maximum number of tokens in the response (1-100,000)
agentConfig.maxContextTokensDescription: Maximum number of tokens for context window (1-100,000)
agentConfig.topPDescription: Nucleus sampling: controls diversity via nucleus probability
agentConfig.frequencyPenaltyDescription: Reduces likelihood of repeating tokens (-2 to 2)
agentConfig.presencePenaltyDescription: Increases likelihood of talking about new topics (-2 to 2)

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Comprehensive audit trail for all system actions. Supports SOC 2 compliance requirements.
auditLogs.viewerDescription: View and filter audit logs for compliance and security monitoring. All logs are tamper-proof via hash chain verification.
auditLogs.totalLogs: {total} total log{total, plural, one {} other {s}} found
auditLogs.noLogsFound: No audit logs found matching your filters.
